beta.description: Shape parameter (β) of the Weibull distribution, used in computing the hazard rate.

mu.description: Scale parameter (μ) of the Weibull distribution, used as the denominator base in the hazard function.

sigma.description: Location parameter (σ) of the Weibull distribution, subtracted from operating time in the hazard function (t - σ).

t.description: Operating time (in hours) at which the hazard rate is to be evaluated.
